# Cassette provenance — bill_initiators

- **Upstream URL**: `https://knesset.gov.il/Odata/ParliamentInfo.svc/KNS_BillInitiator?$format=json&$orderby=BillInitiatorID desc&$top=100`
- **Captured (UTC)**: 2026-04-23T21:09:37Z
- **File**: `tests/fixtures/phase2/cassettes/bill_initiators/sample.json`
- **SHA-256**: `bea9d6677dc9d113e193008859b660792a16761eac521533c8cc813ee728563d`
- **Bytes**: 13479 (100 rows, most recent by BillInitiatorID)

## Real-data shape notes

`KNS_BillInitiator` has no `KnessetNum` column; `$filter=KnessetNum eq 25`
yields HTTP 400. We instead record the most-recent 100 rows (DESC order) so
the cassette covers live Knesset 25 bills without a filter expression that
the server rejects.

Every row has `BillID`, `PersonID`, `IsInitiator` (boolean), and `Ordinal`
populated. The adapter filters `IsInitiator=True` to separate primary
initiators from co-signatories.

Regenerated by `make record-cassettes`. See
`.cursor/rules/real-data-tests.mdc` for the policy.
